_comment: TODO: Build this workflow in ComfyUI UI and export here.
_description: UI icon batch generation: SDXL + Pixel Art XL LoRA → 512x512 → Pixelate to 32x32. Batch of 4 per run. For the 51 UI icons needed.

_prompt_template.positive: pixelart icon, {item}, top-down, centered, flat background, game UI, simple shapes
_prompt_template.negative: blurry, realistic, 3d render, photo, text, watermark, complex details
